chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3815 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.15611/2025 2. For hearing of main case 17.10.2025 Mr. Khalid Jawed Khan, advocate for the petitioner Syed Kumail Abbas Naqvi, advocate for respondent Nos.3 and 4 Learned counsel for respondent Nos. 3 and 4 files statement, which is taken on record. Learned counsel states that the show cause notice and orders of attachment with respect to petitioner have been withdrawn and now there are no proceedings pending thereagainst subject matter herein. In view of the said statement, learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition appears to have served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
